pages.text: I love Mom’s coat! It’s red and long and warm. And it smells like Mom!

blocks.text: I love Mom’s coat! It’s red and long and warm. And it smells like Mom!

pages.text: I love doing things with Mom! We picnic outside. She hugs me when I come home from school. We work in the garden. At night, she holds me tight until I fall asleep.

blocks.text: I love doing things with Mom!
We picnic outside.
She hugs me when I come home from school.
We work in the garden.
At night, she holds me tight until I fall asleep.

pages.text: ‘Good news!’ says Mom. ‘I found a job! I will be away all week, but I’ll come home on weekends!’

blocks.text: ‘Good news!’ says Mom. ‘I found a job! I will be away all week, but I’ll come home on weekends!’

pages.text: ‘Who will hold me at night, Mom?’ ‘Who will hug me, picnic with me, garden with me?’

blocks.text: ‘Who will hold me at night, Mom?’ ‘Who will hug me, picnic with me, garden with me?’

pages.text: ‘I can see that you are sad. I will leave my red coat here with you.’ ‘When you see it, remember that I love you and I’m coming back.’

blocks.text: ‘I can see that you are sad. I will leave my red coat here with you.’
‘When you see it, remember that I love you and I’m coming back.’

pages.text: I drag the red coat outside – it’s my picnic blanket! It feels like Mom is with me. Oops! Juice spill!

blocks.text: I drag the red coat outside – it’s my picnic blanket! It feels like Mom is with me.
Oops! Juice spill!

pages.text: I am sad that Mom’s not waiting at the door when I come home. I put on her coat. It’s warm and it smells like her. It feels like a hug! Oops! Paint!

blocks.text: I am sad that Mom’s not waiting at the door when I come home.
I put on her coat.
It’s warm and it smells like her. It feels like a hug!
Oops! Paint!

pages.text: I help Gogo in the garden. The long coat on the branch scares away the chickens! It feels like Mom is gardening with us. Oops! Mud!

blocks.text: I help Gogo in the garden.
The long coat on the branch scares away the chickens!
It feels like Mom is gardening with us.
Oops! Mud!

pages.text: When it’s dark, I miss Mom most. Gogo covers me with her warm coat. It feels like Mom is holding me as I fall asleep. Oops! Cookie crumbs!

blocks.text: When it’s dark, I miss Mom most.
Gogo covers me with her warm coat.
It feels like Mom is holding me as I fall asleep.
Oops! Cookie crumbs!

pages.text: Mom’s red coat is warm and smells like… paint, juice, mud and cookie crumbs! Oops! We need to wash it!

blocks.text: Mom’s red coat is warm and smells like…
paint, juice,
mud
and cookie crumbs!
Oops! We need to wash it!

pages.text: The wind blows the red coat off the washing line... up in t o the air! It flies overthefence! It flies overthetaxi! Oops! Who did the coat fall on?

blocks.text: The wind blows the red coat off the washing line...
up in t o the air!
It flies overthefence! It flies overthetaxi!
Oops! Who did the coat fall on?

pages.text: I run and grab it! ‘Found you, coat!’ The red coat smells like Mom again. ‘Oh!’ ‘Found you, Mom! You’re back!’

blocks.text: I run and grab it!
‘Found you, coat!’ The red coat smells like Mom again.
‘Oh!’ ‘Found you, Mom! You’re back!’
